tags.note: Area of uncertainty between City Governments of Dasmarinas (Cavite) and San Pedro (Laguna)
Area of uncertainty between City Governments of Dasmarinas (Cavite) and San Pedro (Laguna)

I have noticed that building permits here fall under Barangay San Antonio, San Pedro, Laguna. Additionally, some physical boundary markers indicate that this area, along with 'Cristina Homes', is part of San Pedro, Laguna.
